A Gateway to Blockchain
Mass-Adoption
Blockchain have struggled to reach mass
adoption because of complex transaction
fees logic, expensive development cost and
bad developer experience.

We fix it all.

Lightning-Fast

Faster than 300ms tx confirmation time allows us to build real-time interactions without delays in UX.

Secure

A public-permissioned system prevents malicious Smart Contract deployments and reduces the risk of hacks to a minimum.

User-friendly

Gas-less by design blockchain allows to build decentralised applications without damaging user experience with usual Web3 issues for blockchain newcomers.

Developer-Friendly

EVM blockchain enhanced with Saakuru Developer Suite provides a gateway for launching user-friendly applications cost-efficiently and with very little Web3 development knowledge.
